latest_post.title: Service Interruption: May 10-16, 2026
latest_post.excerpt: May 10, 2026 (Sunday) Time: 8:00 AM to 12:00 PM (4hrs) Purpose: To improve the reliability of the distribution system serving Brgy. Inayagan, Tuyan & Tunghaan by facilitating reconstruction of primary lines. Areas Affected: Portion of Inayagan, Tuyan & Tunghaan, City of Naga & Minglanilla, along portions of Cebu South Road.
